member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateManifestCommand
member.summary: Command that creates a new manifest in Draft status for the specified organization.
member.param: The owning organization's ID.
Display name for the manifest.
Optional human-readable description.
Optional initial JSON content blob.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateManifestCommand.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Command that creates a new manifest in Draft status for the specified organization.
member.param: The owning organization's ID.
Display name for the manifest.
Optional human-readable description.
Optional initial JSON content blob.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateManifestCommand.OrganizationId
member.summary: The owning organization's ID.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateManifestCommand.Name
member.summary: Display name for the manifest.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateManifestCommand.Description
member.summary: Optional human-readable description.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateManifestCommand.Content
member.summary: Optional initial JSON content blob.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateManifestCommandHandler
member.summary: Handles . Creates a new draft manifest for the specified organization and persists it.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateOrganizationCommand
member.summary: Command that requests the creation of a new organization. Implements so MediatR can route it to without the caller needing a direct reference to the handler.
member.param: The validated input data for the new organization.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateOrganizationCommand.#ctor(LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.CreateOrganizationDto)
member.summary: Command that requests the creation of a new organization. Implements so MediatR can route it to without the caller needing a direct reference to the handler.
member.param: The validated input data for the new organization.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateOrganizationCommand.Data
member.summary: The validated input data for the new organization.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateOrganizationCommandHandler
member.summary:
Handles by enforcing business rules, constructing the domain entity via its factory, and persisting it.
Business rules enforced here (rather than in the controller) so they apply regardless of how the command is triggered:
Organization code must be unique within the same parent scope.
The specified parent organization must already exist.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateOrganizationCommandHandler.#ctor(LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository)
member.summary: Initializes the handler with the organization repository injected by the DI container.
member.param: Abstraction over the Organizations table.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateOrganizationCommandHandler.Handle(LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.CreateOrganizationCommand,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the create-organization use case end-to-end: validate → construct domain entity → persist → return DTO.
member.param: The command carrying the new organization's data.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.
member.returns: A DTO representing the newly created organization.
member.exception: Thrown if the code already exists under the same parent, or if the specified parent organization does not exist.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.DeleteOrganizationCommand
member.summary: Command that soft-deletes an organization by marking it inactive. The organization record is retained in the database to preserve audit trails and foreign key relationships with manifests.
member.param: Primary key of the organization to delete.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.DeleteOrganizationCommand.#ctor(System.Guid)
member.summary: Command that soft-deletes an organization by marking it inactive. The organization record is retained in the database to preserve audit trails and foreign key relationships with manifests.
member.param: Primary key of the organization to delete.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.DeleteOrganizationCommand.Id
member.summary: Primary key of the organization to delete.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.DeleteOrganizationCommandHandler
member.summary: Handles . Soft-deletes the organization by setting IsActive to false. Rejects the request if the org has active children to avoid orphaning them.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.DeleteOrganizationCommandHandler.#ctor(LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository)
member.summary: Initializes the handler with the organization repository injected by the DI container.
member.param: Repository for loading and persisting organizations.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.PublishManifestCommand
member.summary: Command that transitions a draft manifest to Published status and archives the previously published manifest for the same organization (if one exists).
member.param: The owning organization's ID.
The draft manifest to publish.
Which version component to increment: "major", "minor", or "patch". The new version is calculated from the current highest version for this org.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.PublishManifestCommand.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Command that transitions a draft manifest to Published status and archives the previously published manifest for the same organization (if one exists).
member.param: The owning organization's ID.
The draft manifest to publish.
Which version component to increment: "major", "minor", or "patch". The new version is calculated from the current highest version for this org.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.PublishManifestCommand.OrganizationId
member.summary: The owning organization's ID.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.PublishManifestCommand.ManifestId
member.summary: The draft manifest to publish.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.PublishManifestCommand.VersionBump
member.summary: Which version component to increment: "major", "minor", or "patch". The new version is calculated from the current highest version for this org.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.PublishManifestCommandHandler
member.summary: Handles . 1. Loads the draft manifest (returns null → 404 if not found). 2. Archives the currently published manifest for the org (if one exists). 3. Bumps the version and publishes the draft.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.UpdateOrganizationCommand
member.summary: Command that requests a partial update of an existing organization's mutable fields. Only name, type, and active status can change — the code and hierarchy are immutable after creation to preserve referential integrity.
member.param: Primary key of the organization to update.
New display name.
New organization type.
Whether the organization should remain active.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.UpdateOrganizationCommand.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Enums.OrganizationType,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Command that requests a partial update of an existing organization's mutable fields. Only name, type, and active status can change — the code and hierarchy are immutable after creation to preserve referential integrity.
member.param: Primary key of the organization to update.
New display name.
New organization type.
Whether the organization should remain active.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.UpdateOrganizationCommand.Id
member.summary: Primary key of the organization to update.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.UpdateOrganizationCommand.Name
member.summary: New display name.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.UpdateOrganizationCommand.Type
member.summary: New organization type.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.UpdateOrganizationCommand.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the organization should remain active.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.UpdateOrganizationCommandHandler
member.summary:
Handles .
TODO: implement. Steps will be: 1. Load org by ID (404 if not found). 2. Call org.Update(name, type, isActive) — domain method validates and stamps UpdatedAt. 3. Persist via . 4. Return updated DTO.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Commands.UpdateOrganizationCommandHandler.#ctor(LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository)
member.summary: Initializes the handler with the organization repository injected by the DI container.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.CreateManifestDto
member.summary: Carries the input data needed to create a new manifest draft. Flows from the API layer through to the manifest command handler.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.CreateManifestDto.Name
member.summary: Display name for the manifest. Must not be blank.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.CreateManifestDto.Description
member.summary: Optional human-readable description of what this manifest covers.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.CreateManifestDto.Content
member.summary: Optional initial JSON content following the courses/activities structure. Defaults to an empty object if not provided; content can be added before publishing.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.CreateOrganizationDto
member.summary: Carries the input data needed to create a new organization. Flows from the API layer (deserialized from the HTTP request body) through to .

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.CreateOrganizationDto.Name
member.summary: Display name for the organization. Must not be blank.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.CreateOrganizationDto.Code
member.summary: Short identifier code. Must be unique within the same parent scope. Stored as uppercase.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.CreateOrganizationDto.Type
member.summary: The kind of organization being created.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.CreateOrganizationDto.ParentId
member.summary: ID of the parent organization, or null to create a root-level organization.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.CreateOrganizationDto.ExternalId
member.summary: Optional reference to an identity in an external system (e.g., OIDC directory).

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.ManifestDto
member.summary: Read model for a manifest, returned by manifest queries and commands. Includes the full JSON so the training app can consume the manifest in a single response without a follow-up request.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.ManifestDto.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier of the manifest.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.ManifestDto.OrganizationId
member.summary: ID of the organization this manifest belongs to.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.ManifestDto.Name
member.summary: Display name.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.ManifestDto.Description
member.summary: Optional human-readable description of the manifest's content.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.ManifestDto.Version
member.summary: Semantic version string (e.g., "1.2.0").

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.ManifestDto.Status
member.summary: Current lifecycle status: Draft, Published, or Archived.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.ManifestDto.Content
member.summary: JSON blob describing the courses and learning activities. Consumed directly by the downstream training application.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.ManifestDto.PublishedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the manifest was published, or null if still a draft.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.ManifestDto.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the manifest was created.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.ManifestDto.UpdatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp of the most recent update.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.OrganizationDto
member.summary:
Read model for an organization, returned by queries and commands. Includes a recursive collection so callers receive the full org subtree in a single response without needing extra requests.
Using a dedicated DTO (rather than exposing the domain entity directly) keeps the API contract stable when the entity's internal structure changes, and avoids circular-reference issues during JSON serialization.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.OrganizationDto.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier of the organization.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.OrganizationDto.ParentId
member.summary: ID of the parent organization, or null for a root org.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.OrganizationDto.Name
member.summary: Display name.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.OrganizationDto.Code
member.summary: Short identifier code (uppercase).

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.OrganizationDto.Type
member.summary: The kind of organization.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.OrganizationDto.ExternalId
member.summary: Optional reference to an external identity system.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.OrganizationDto.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the organization is currently active.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.OrganizationDto.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the organization was created.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.OrganizationDto.UpdatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp of the most recent update.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.OrganizationDto.Children
member.summary: Direct child organizations, each with their own children recursively.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Mappers.ManifestMapper
member.summary: Converts between domain entities and read models used by the Application layer.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Mappers.ManifestMapper.ToDto(LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest)
member.summary: Maps a domain entity to a read DTO, including the full JSON content blob so consumers (e.g., the training app) receive everything in one response.
member.param: The entity loaded from the repository.
member.returns: A ready to return to the caller.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Mappers.OrganizationMapper
member.summary: Converts between domain entities and the DTOs used by the Application layer. Keeping mapping logic in one place means the controller, command handler, and query handler all produce consistent output shapes.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Mappers.OrganizationMapper.ToDto(LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization)
member.summary: Maps a domain entity to a read DTO. Recursively maps each child organization so the caller receives the full subtree in one object.
member.param: The entity loaded from the repository.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Mappers.OrganizationMapper.ToEntity(LaerdalImplementation.Application.DTOs.CreateOrganizationDto,System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Creates a new entity from a create DTO by delegating to the domain factory method, which enforces validation invariants.
member.param: The input data, typically sourced from the HTTP request.
Explicit parent ID to use; falls back to if not provided.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetManifestsByOrganizationQuery
member.summary: Query that returns all manifests (all statuses) for the given organization.
member.param: The owning organization's ID.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetManifestsByOrganizationQuery.#ctor(System.Guid)
member.summary: Query that returns all manifests (all statuses) for the given organization.
member.param: The owning organization's ID.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetManifestsByOrganizationQuery.OrganizationId
member.summary: The owning organization's ID.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetManifestsByOrganizationQueryHandler
member.summary: Handles . Returns all manifests for the organization ordered newest first.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationByIdQuery
member.summary: Query that requests a single organization by its primary key ID, including its parent reference and direct children. Returns null when no organization with that ID exists.
member.param: The primary key of the organization to retrieve.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationByIdQuery.#ctor(System.Guid)
member.summary: Query that requests a single organization by its primary key ID, including its parent reference and direct children. Returns null when no organization with that ID exists.
member.param: The primary key of the organization to retrieve.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationByIdQuery.Id
member.summary: The primary key of the organization to retrieve.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationByIdQueryHandler
member.summary: Handles by fetching a single organization directly from the repository by primary key, then mapping it to a DTO.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationByIdQueryHandler.#ctor(LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository)
member.summary: Initializes the handler with the organization repository injected by the DI container.
member.param: Abstraction over the Organizations table.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationByIdQueryHandler.Handle(LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationByIdQuery,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches the organization with the specified ID and maps it to a DTO, or returns null if no such organization exists.
member.param: The query carrying the target organization ID.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationsQuery
member.summary:
Query that requests a list of organizations, with an optional filter by parent.
When is null, all organizations are returned.
When is set, only direct children of that org are returned.
member.param: Optional parent organization ID to filter by.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationsQuery.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary:
Query that requests a list of organizations, with an optional filter by parent.
When is null, all organizations are returned.
When is set, only direct children of that org are returned.
member.param: Optional parent organization ID to filter by.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationsQuery.ParentId
member.summary: Optional parent organization ID to filter by.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationsQueryHandler
member.summary: Handles by retrieving organizations from the repository and mapping them to DTOs.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationsQueryHandler.#ctor(LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository)
member.summary: Initializes the handler with the organization repository injected by the DI container.
member.param: Abstraction over the Organizations table.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationsQueryHandler.Handle(LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetOrganizationsQuery,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches organizations — all of them, or only direct children of the specified parent — and maps each to a (including nested children).
member.param: The query, optionally carrying a parent ID filter.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetPublishedManifestQuery
member.summary: Query used by the downstream training application to fetch the currently published manifest for an organization before starting a learner session. Identified by organization code (not ID) so the training app doesn't need to store internal GUIDs — the code is stable and human-readable.
member.param: The organization's short identifier code (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetPublishedManifestQuery.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Query used by the downstream training application to fetch the currently published manifest for an organization before starting a learner session. Identified by organization code (not ID) so the training app doesn't need to store internal GUIDs — the code is stable and human-readable.
member.param: The organization's short identifier code (case-insensitive).

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetPublishedManifestQuery.OrgCode
member.summary: The organization's short identifier code (case-insensitive).

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetPublishedManifestQueryHandler
member.summary:
Handles .
TODO: implement. Steps will be: 1. Resolve org by code via IOrganizationRepository.GetByCodeAsync (null parentId for root, or extend the interface to support a code-only lookup). 2. If org not found, return null (caller returns 404). 3. Call IManifestRepository.GetPublishedByOrganizationAsync(org.Id) — this hits the IX_Manifest_OrgStatus index. 4. Map to and return.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Queries.GetPublishedManifestQueryHandler.#ctor(LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository,LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IManifestRepository)
member.summary: Initializes the handler with repositories injected by the DI container.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Services.AuthenticationService
member.summary:
Handles OIDC token validation and extracts a typed principal from the JWT.
TODO: implement. Responsibilities:
Fetch and cache the Laerdal OIDC public key (JWKS endpoint, 5-min TTL).
Validate the JWT signature, expiry, and issuer on each request.
Extract sub, org, and roles claims into a typed principal.
Surface the principal via an interface so controllers and policies can read it.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Services.AuthenticationService.ValidateTokenAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates the bearer token from the HTTP Authorization header and returns the authenticated principal, or throws if the token is invalid/expired.
member.param: Raw JWT string (without "Bearer " prefix).
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Services.AuthorizationService
member.summary:
Enforces role-based and scope-based access control for organizations and manifests.
TODO: implement. Authorization levels:
LaerdalAdmin (role = laerdal_admin) — full CRUD on any organization, full manifest management across all orgs.
OrgAdmin (role = org_admin + orgId claim) — CRUD scoped to their own org and descendants; cannot modify the parent org.
OrgEditor (role = org_editor) — can draft and publish manifests; read-only on organization settings.
ServiceAccount — OAuth 2.0 client credentials; read-only access scoped to a specific org code via the manifest:read:{orgCode} scope.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Application.Services.AuthorizationService.CanAccessOrganizationAsync(System.Object,System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns true if the current principal is allowed to perform the requested operation on the specified organization.
member.param: The authenticated principal (from AuthenticationService).
The target organization.
The minimum role required for the operation.
